CustomField.description: With Maintenance Reserves option, you will be able to calculate MR, generate Invoices and update Running Balance (Invoiced) and Running Balance (Accrued). With End of Lease Adjustment, you will be able to calculate MR but Invoices will not be generated, and, update only Running Balance (Accrued).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: With Maintenance Reserves option, you will be able to calculate MR, generate Invoices and update Running Balance (Invoiced) and Running Balance (Accrued). With End of Lease Adjustment, you will be able to calculate MR but Invoices will not be generated, and, update only Running Balance (Accrued).
CustomField.label: Type
